'''rabogo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:nibbana|nibbana]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-b-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nibbana|nibbana]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| rabogo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ræbegeth|ræbegeth]] || [[word:ræbegej|ræbegej]] || [[word:ræbegesh|ræbegesh]] || [[word:ræbege|ræbege]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:rabobogoth|rabobogoth]] || [[word:rabobogoj|rabobogoj]] || [[word:rabobogosh|rabobogosh]] || [[word:rabobogo|rabobogo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:rabogoth|rabogoth]] || [[word:rabogoj|rabogoj]] || [[word:rabogosh|rabogosh]] || [[word:rabogo|rabogo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:rabofgoth|rabofgoth]] || [[word:rabofgoj|rabofgoj]] || [[word:rabofgosh|rabofgosh]] || [[word:rabofgof|rabofgof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:rabogotho|rabogotho]] || [[word:rabogojo|rabogojo]] || [[word:rabogosho|rabogosho]] || [[word:rabogoko|rabogoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:rabogoth|rabogoth]] || [[word:rabogoj|rabogoj]] || [[word:rabogosh|rabogosh]] || [[word:rabogo|rabogo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:rabogothol|rabogothol]] || [[word:rabogojol|rabogojol]] || [[word:rabogoshol|rabogoshol]] || [[word:rabogokol|rabogokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:rabogothotho|rabogothotho]] || [[word:rabogojojo|rabogojojo]] || [[word:rabogoshosho|rabogoshosho]] || [[word:rabogoko|rabogoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:rabogothon|rabogothon]] || [[word:rabogojon|rabogojon]] || [[word:rabogoshon|rabogoshon]] || [[word:rabogokon|rabogokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:rabogothoro|rabogothoro]] || [[word:rabogojoro|rabogojoro]] || [[word:rabogoshoro|rabogoshoro]] || [[word:rabogokoro|rabogokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|b863984}}
